summary: Successfully completed testing of cinematic hero system upgrade. All AI Core visual enhancements working perfectly - multi-ring energy system, directional lighting, stronger vignette, increased visual weight, and theme switching all functional.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads correctly at /dashboard with all content intact
Core energy rings present with correct data-testids (core-ring-inner, core-ring-mid, core-ring-outer)
AI Core light bleed present with data-testid ai-core-light-bleed
AI Core placeholder has glass-panel-hero class
AI Core icon has ai-presence class and w-14 h-14 size (increased visual weight)
All animation classes working: core-pulse on outer ring, ai-glow-breathe on inner/mid rings
4 background layers present: bg-layer-primary, bg-layer-secondary, bg-layer-floor, bg-vignette
All content counts correct: 3 attention, 3 projects, 4 trades, 4 schedule, 4 tasks, 4 stats
Theme switching works correctly across commercial/molten/remembrance themes
All entrance animations present and functional
Hover effects working on action buttons
Visual hierarchy achieved: AI Core primary, center secondary, side columns tertiary
